results.title: Practice makes perfect drivers
results.brief_description: Lists a number of ways in which a motorist may improve his driving techniques; driving on rough roads and under bad weather conditions; passing other vehicles on the road; control of a vehicle in a skid, when dlipping under icy conditions and after a blowout; recommended techniques for driving at dusk and under night conditions.

results.title: Practical organic chemistry: simple techniques for the preparation of solids
results.creator_credit: M.E. Fox and State Film Centre of Victoria
results.brief_description: Demonstrates the preparation of organic compounds taking place in three stages: reaction isolation and purification. Phenol reacts with benzol; chloride with alkaline solution to give rhenyl benzoate; solium chloride with water. All steps in the isolation of phenol and acetophenone semi-carbazone are demonstrated.
results.creator_credit_for_label: M.E. Fox and State Film Centre of Victoria

results.title: Practical film making
results.creator_credit: Bill Brame, Julian Bercovici, Encyclopaedia Britannica Films and Julian Films
results.brief_description: Traces the production of an independent feature film from selection of the script to the final editing, emphasising at each step the importance of planning; gives an insight into the roles of the main crew members and practical production tips.

results.title: Power to serve
results.creator_credit: Kenneth J. Fairbairn and Athos Film Productions
results.brief_description: The significance of power as a servant of the British industrial community. Explains how scientific understanding and technological skills are utilised and deployed in the manufacture of different power units; concentrates on engines and hows something of the research and testing undertaken before quantity production can commence.

results.title: Power progress, 1951
results.brief_description: A report on progress being made in the building of dams and power stations as part of an extensive project to increase hydro-electric output in New Zealand. The latter part of the film shows experiments on the utilization of geo-thermal energy from the country’s many geysers.

results.title: Power on the farm
results.brief_description: A comprehensive survey of the advantages which electrical power supply offers to those living in rural areas. On poultry farms, dairy farms, and small mixed farms, electricity can prove an excellent time and labour saver, both for the farmer and his wife.
